report.summary: Day 71 cycle-close v3: Egress blocked — local-only verification. 3 new files created since last cycle (2 learn pages + component) but uncommitted/undeployed. 42 TS errors in 2 files (pre-existing). /trading hub pages still 404. Vercel trial likely expired (was 2 days remaining on Mar 22). No new commits since Mar 17.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: EGRESS BLOCKED: Cannot verify production page status from this sandbox. degen0x.com blocked by network proxy.

NEW FILES DETECTED (since last cycle): src/app/learn/crypto-wallet-security-guide-2026/page.tsx, src/app/learn/crypto-market-cycles-guide-2026/page.tsx, src/components/WalletSecurityScoreCalculator.tsx — all created locally but NOT committed or deployed.
BOTH NEW LEARN PAGES are already listed in PUBLISHED_PAGES — ready for commit+deploy when pipeline resumes.

TYPESCRIPT ERRORS: 42 errors across 2 files: src/lib/structured-data.examples.ts (JSX in non-JSX file) and src/app/learn/crypto-index-funds-guide-2026/page.tsx (unescaped > in JSX). Pre-existing — not new regressions.
BUILD TEST: Production build crashed with 'Bus error (core dumped)' in sandbox — likely OOM in constrained VM, not a real build failure. Last successful Vercel build was 4m 11s.
404 CARRY-OVER [P1]: /trading hub page.tsx still MISSING. /trading/learn index page.tsx still MISSING. Both flagged since last cycle.
ORPHAN SLUGS: 103 slugs in PUBLISHED_PAGES without matching page.tsx files (unchanged from last cycle). Mostly /learn/* articles served by dynamic [slug] routes.
PAGE COUNT: 471 slugs in PUBLISHED_PAGES (down 1 from 472 in last count — likely counting variance).

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: EGRESS BLOCKED: Cannot verify any API routes from this sandbox. No live health check possible.
NO CODE CHANGES to API routes since last cycle. All 6 routes (/api/health, /api/prices, /api/trending, /api/fear-greed, /api/market-dominance, /api/defi-yields) unchanged.
LAST VERIFIED (v2 report): All 6 routes were healthy with fresh data. BTC at $70,845, Fear & Greed at 11 (Extreme Fear), BTC dominance 56.58%.
CARRY-OVER [P1]: Rate limiter still not wired on public API routes. /api/health shows 1500 rate limit bucket but core routes unprotected.
CARRY-OVER [P1]: /api/defi-yields still lacks fallback data on upstream failure.
CARRY-OVER [P2]: X-Cache-Source headers not verifiable — need server-side check.

sections.title: DevOps
items: EGRESS BLOCKED: Cannot verify Vercel deployment status from this sandbox.
NO NEW COMMITS since e999560 (Mar 17) — 'publish: promote 2 pages to production (Day 62)'. Pipeline idle for 7 days.
CRITICAL [P0]: Vercel trial was '2 days remaining' as of Mar 22 report. Today is Mar 24 — trial has LIKELY EXPIRED. Site may be down or degraded. Requires Jefe to add payment method IMMEDIATELY.
3 LOCAL FILES uncommitted: 2 learn pages + 1 component created but never committed to git or deployed to Vercel.
BUILD SANDBOX: Local build crashed (Bus error / OOM in sandbox VM). Does not indicate production build failure — last Vercel build succeeded at 4m 11s.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: SHIPPED THIS CYCLE: Nothing deployed. 3 files created locally but uncommitted. No new Vercel deployments since Mar 17.
CRITICAL BLOCKER [P0]: Vercel trial likely expired. Site may be inaccessible. This is the #1 priority — everything else is blocked until billing is resolved.
BLOCKER [P1]: /trading and /trading/learn hub pages still missing (404). Carry-over from multiple cycles.
BLOCKER [P1]: 42 TypeScript errors in 2 files should be fixed before next commit to keep CI clean.
UNCOMMITTED WORK: crypto-wallet-security-guide-2026, crypto-market-cycles-guide-2026, and WalletSecurityScoreCalculator.tsx ready to commit once pipeline is confirmed working.
CARRY-OVER [P1]: Rate limiter not wired on 6 public API routes.
CARRY-OVER [P2]: 103 orphan slugs in PUBLISHED_PAGES may lack page.tsx files.
NEXT CYCLE PRIORITIES: (1) Resolve Vercel billing P0, (2) Commit + deploy uncommitted learn pages, (3) Create /trading hub page, (4) Fix 42 TS errors.
